title: Fix Tooltip Mismatch on Reports and Dashboards Section Header
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the section title and info tooltip to correctly identify the Reports and Dashboards tab, so that I am not confused by mismatched labels.
description: Fixes the section header title to read "Reports and Dashboards" and corrects the info icon tooltip which was displaying text from a different tab. The tooltip now reads: "Searchable list of reports and dashboards in your Salesforce org."
acceptance_criteria: Info icon tooltip reads 'Searchable list of reports and dashboards in your Salesforce org'
No tooltip text from other tabs appears on this page
ux_changes: Corrected section title and info icon tooltip text to match the Reports and Dashboards tab.
implementation_notes: Simple text correction in the template.
comment_summary: Balaji fixed and submitted for review.
